channel.title: OpenAI-Selection
channel.description: OpenAI News から選別された記事フィード

item.title: エージェント時代におけるAI投資の管理方法(How to manage AI investments in the agentic era)
item.description: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.

item.title: 営業チームはChatGPT Workをどのように活用するか(How sales teams use ChatGPT Work)
item.description: See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.

item.title: データサイエンスチームはChatGPT Workをどのように活用するか(How data science teams use ChatGPT Work)
item.description: See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.
